---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or error in a skill
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Which Skill?
Which skill is affected? (e.g., financial-analysis, ecl-computation)

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Run '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- AI Agent: [e.g., Claude Code, Cursor]
- OS: [e.g., macOS, Windows, Linux]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.11]
- How installed: [CLI, Manual, etc.]

## Additional Context
Screenshots, error messages, or other relevant information.
